en: Binds a preset's abilities to a player.
Can bind either player-specific presets or external presets.
The abilities will be bound to the player's hotbar in the order they were added to the preset.
Assigns a ProjectKorra bending ability to a specific hotbar slot (1-9) for a player. If no slot is specified, it uses the player's currently selected hotbar slot.

Removes any bending ability bound to a specified hotbar slot. If no slot number is given, clears the ability from the player's currently selected slot. Use this to remove unwanted abilities from a player's hotbar.
Creates a new preset with optional abilities.
Can create either a player-specific preset or an external preset.
If a preset with the same name exists, it will be overwritten.
External presets are available to all players.
Deletes a preset from a player or removes an external preset.
Player presets are only deleted for that specific player.
External presets are completely removed from the server.
Enables or disables all bending abilities for a player. When disabled, the player cannot use any bending abilities until re-enabled. Can toggle between states or set to a specific state.
Checks if a player's bending is enabled or disabled.
Returns true if bending is enabled, false if disabled.
Returns the player's currently bound ability or the ability bound to a specific slot.
If no slot is specified, returns the ability from the current active slot.
Returns nothing if the slot is empty or invalid.
Returns a list of all preset names. Can return player-specific presets, external (global) presets, or both.
Returns a list of all abilities currently bound to a player's slots (1-9). Empty slots will return an empty string. The returned list is always 9 elements long, representing each slot.
Returns the element type (Water, Earth, Fire, Air, Chi, or sub-elements) of a specified ProjectKorra ability. Returns nothing if the ability doesn't exist.
Gets all abilities from a player's preset or an external preset.
Returns a list of ability names stored in the preset.
Checks if a bending preset configuration exists. Can verify both player-specific presets and server-wide (external) presets.
Checks whether a location is occupied by a ProjectKorra TempBlock.
Creates a ProjectKorra TempBlock at the specified location, optionally reverting after a duration.
Reverts a ProjectKorra TempBlock at a location, optionally specifying the default material.
Returns the remaining duration of a ProjectKorra cooldown for a player as a timespan. Returns zero when the cooldown is not active.
Launches a registered ProjectKorra ability defined through this addon for a specific player.
Lists active ProjectKorra cooldowns for a player in the same order as /bending cooldown view.
Sets the anchor location for a running ability instance generated through this addon, allowing you to track it independently from the player.
[skript-pk] No official English guide provided.
Defines a ProjectKorra ability implemented in Skript.
Clears a ProjectKorra cooldown for a player, or removes every active cooldown when using the "all" variant.
Sets a ProjectKorra cooldown for a player. Using a non-positive duration removes the cooldown instead.
Returns recent bendable block sources for a player's element using ProjectKorra's BlockSource logic.
[skript-pk] No official English guide provided.
Ends a running ProjectKorra ability generated through this addon. When used without an argument inside start/progress/remove sections, it stops the active ability instance.
